title: Top 20 Must-See Movies of 2012
description: The article is a table listing the movie title, director, genre, and IMDb rating for 20 popular films including Argo, Django Unchained, The Avengers, and The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey.
keywords: The Perks of Being a Wallflower

title: Top Headlines of 2012: From Tragedies to Triumphs
description: The article is a list of significant events that occurred in 2012, including the Costa Concordia disaster, Queen Elizabeth II's Diamond Jubilee, the Facebook IPO, the Aurora shooting, and the re-election of Barack Obama as President of the United States.

title: The Artist Dominates: 2012 Academy Award Winners
description: The 84th Academy Awards saw The Artist win Best Picture, Best Director for Michel Hazanavicius, Best Actor for Jean Dujardin, and Best Costume Design. Meryl Streep won Best Actress for her portrayal of Margaret Thatcher in The Iron Lady.
